title: irenea flavescens
intro: Irenea flavescens, also known as the yellow iris, is a perennial plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Irenea flavescens include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as relieving symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Irenea flavescens is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in capsule or tablet form to harness its medicinal properties.
